messages.content: Draft an email to my supplier about delayed shipment
I'll draft a professional email for you regarding the delayed shipment. Let me prepare that now.

metadata.subject: Re: Shipment Delay - Order #12345
metadata.preview:
Dear Supplier,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to follow up on our order #12345, which was expected to arrive by February 8th...

messages.content:
Here's your email draft! I've kept the tone professional yet firm. The email mentions:

• Order reference (#12345)
• Expected delivery date
• Request for updated timeline
• Impact on your operations

Shall I send it, or would you like to make any changes?
Looks great! Send it to supplier@example.com
Done! The email has been sent to supplier@example.com. I've saved a copy in your sent folder. Would you like me to set a reminder to follow up if you don't hear back in 2 days?
Analyze my customer feedback from last month
I'll analyze the customer feedback data from January. Let me pull up the reports.

Here's your January customer sentiment report:

📊 **Overall Score: 4.2/5** (Up from 3.8 last month)

✅ **Positive (72%)**: Customers love your product quality and fast delivery
😐 **Neutral (18%)**: Some feedback about packaging
❌ **Negative (10%)**: Complaints about return process

**Top Keywords**: "great quality", "fast delivery", "good price"
**Areas to Improve**: Return policy clarity, packaging quality
Give me a summary of today's tasks

Good morning! Here's your daily briefing:

📋 **Today's Priority Tasks:**

1. **Supplier Follow-up** — Messenger drafted and sent your delay email ✅
2. **Customer Analysis** — Data Analyser completed January sentiment report ✅
3. **Pending Orders** — 23 orders awaiting processing
4. **Team Meeting** — Scheduled at 3 PM (Alarmy will remind you)
5. **Invoice Review** — Ledgerer flagged 3 invoices needing approval

💡 **Quick Insight**: Revenue is up 13.6% this month. The Sales Agent is tracking 3 new leads from your website.

Want me to prioritize any specific task?
